content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Park Lighting". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1358/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and m. The second line contains n integers representing the lamps.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print 'YES' if it's possible to light all the houses, otherwise print 'NO'

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the lamps and check if the distance between any two lamps is greater than m
